hooks.command: PROJECT_DIR="${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-$PWD}"; SCRIPT="$PROJECT_DIR/tools/session_check.py"; if [ ! -f "$SCRIPT" ]; then echo '{"hookSpecificOutput": {"hookEventName": "SessionStart", "additionalContext": "[协议异常] tools/session_check.py 缺失；不得静默开始工作。"}}'; elif [ -x "$PROJECT_DIR/.venv/Scripts/python.exe" ]; then "$PROJECT_DIR/.venv/Scripts/python.exe" "$SCRIPT" --hook; elif [ -x "$PROJECT_DIR/.venv/bin/python" ]; then "$PROJECT_DIR/.venv/bin/python" "$SCRIPT" --hook; elif command -v python3 >/dev/null 2>&1; then python3 "$SCRIPT" --hook; elif command -v python >/dev/null 2>&1; then python "$SCRIPT" --hook; elif [ -f "$PROJECT_DIR/bootstrap.md" ]; then echo '{"hookSpecificOutput": {"hookEventName": "SessionStart", "additionalContext": "[未初始化] Python 不可用；请手动读取 bootstrap.md，并要求用户仅回复 A 或 B。"}}'; else echo '{"hookSpecificOutput": {"hookEventName": "SessionStart", "additionalContext": "[协议异常] Python 不可用，session_check 未运行；请手动检查 MODE.md、HANDOFF.md 与 Discussion.md，修复 harness 后再工作。"}}'; fi
